title: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, August 25 2021
section_path: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, August 25 2021
section_path_text: Weekly Tanker Time Charter Estimates, August 25 2021
summary:
Main
With a grim outlook for the rest of the year, it's becoming increasingly difficult to be optimistic for this sector. Some period interest in the Aframax sector this week as port delays in Asia have created some demand for this class. In the clean market, some MR fixtures have been reported that are keeping this sector ticking over but on the whole very limited activity to report.
